_meta: Field-level source priority config. First entry in each list wins when multiple sources provide the same field. V1 defaults: GED is primary for status and dates.

_notes.visa_global: COMPUTED means it is always recomputed from worst-case TAG_PRIORITY — never taken directly from any source.
_notes.comment: REPORT is first for comments because PDF reports tend to have richer reviewer annotations than GED free-text fields.
_notes.conflict_behaviour: When two sources at the same priority level provide different values, log a STATUS_CONFLICT anomaly and use the first source in this list.
